## gang's First App

API Key

Copy

[Node RPC Setup](/apps/o1bz0nm1v0inmcrn/setup)[App Metrics](/apps/o1bz0nm1v0inmcrn/metrics)

Endpoint URL

Copy

Network

![Ethereum Mainnet](images/img_001.svg)

Ethereum Mainnet

Method

eth\_blockNumber - Get the latest block number

Send request

Request

```
1curl https://eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/yUWc_wLg_TSq_8f09jOLg \
2     --request POST \
3     --header 'accept: application/json' \
4     --header 'content-type: application/json' \
5     --data '{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_blockNumber"}'
```
